title: obione canescens
intro: Obione canescens, also known as the Silky Sea-blite or Coastal Sea-blite, is a type of flowering plant in the Chenopodiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Obione canescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas or infusions, and can also be used as a topical application for skin irritations and wounds.
